zh.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可拉文哈姆
zh.Long Melford, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可朗 梅爾福德
zh.Sudbury, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可素德波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hammond於1500年4月16日出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，他的父親John Hammond25歲，母親Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach25歲。他於大約1541年與Agnes Nowell在英國英格蘭素福爾可拉文哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆被列為cloth business。他去世於1550年12月22日在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hammond于1500年4月16日出生在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆时，他的父亲John Hammond25岁，母亲Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach25岁。他于大约1541年与Agnes Nowell在英国英格兰素福爾可拉文哈姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆被列为cloth business。他去世于1550年12月22日在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hammond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Ha(i)mon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. It frequently developed excrescent -d, giving Hamond, Haimund, and Hawmond. Alternatively, the name could derive from the Middle English personal name Hamund (Old Norse Hámundr, composed of the elements hár ‘high’ + mund ‘protection’), which may have been used in Normandy and in 12th-century eastern England, but the former explanation is more likely. The surname was sometimes confused with Almond and Ammon .

English: in the Bradford area of Yorkshire, the name is a shortened form of Ormondroyd, formerly Hamondesrode, from a lost place in Birstall (Yorkshire), named with the Middle English (Old French) personal name Hamon (1 above) + Middle English roid, a southern Yorkshire pronunciation of Old English rod ‘clearing’.
Irish: generally an importation from England, but occasionally an adopted name for Mac Ámoinn, see McCammon .

variants.name: Hammonds
meanings: English (Shropshire and Staffordshire): variant of Hammond , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Almond
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Almund, in which Old English Æthelmund ‘noble protector’ and Ealhmund ‘temple protector’ have coalesced.
variant of   Allman   and   Allmand   both meaning ‘German’, assimilated by folk etymology to the vocabulary word denoting the tree.

variants.name: Hammett
meanings: English (southwestern England, especialy Devon): from the Middle English personal name Hamet, a pet form of ancient Germanic Hamo (see Hammond 1).

variants.name: Hamon
meanings: Breton, French, and English (Channel Islands): from the Breton, Old French, Middle English personal name Hamon, the oblique case form of the ancient Germanic Ha(i)mo, a short form of various compound names beginning with haim ‘home’. See also Hammond .

variants.name: Hamlin
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, from the Norman French and Middle English personal name Hamelin, a double diminutive of Hamo (see Hammond ).
French: variant of   Hamelin   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Hampson
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): patronymic from the Norman personal name Hamo, Hamon (see Hammond ).
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAmhsaigh ‘descendant of Amhsach’ a byname meaning ‘mercenary soldier’ or ‘messenger’, from the adjective amhasach ‘aggressive’.

variants.name: Haimes
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yacov, Yosef.

English: variant, with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s, of Haime, of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Haim (ancient Germanic Haimo, from haim- ‘home’), often Latinized as Hamo. Compare Hammond .
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

variants.name: Hammon
meanings: English (Middlesex and Ken): variant of   Hammond  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hammond was born on 16 April 1500, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, his father, John Hammond, was 25 and his mother, Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach, was 25. He married Agnes Nowell about 1541, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as cloth business in Lavenham, Suffolk, England. He died on 22 December 1550, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hammond est né le 16 avril 1500, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Hammond, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Nowell environ 1541, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est cloth business à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 22 décembre 1550, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hammond am 16. April 1500 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hammond 25 und seine Mutter Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach 25. Er hat um 1541 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Agnes Nowell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als cloth business in Lavenham, Suffolk, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Dezember 1550 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lavenham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hammond è nato il il 16 aprile 1500 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Hammond, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Nowell circa 1541, nel Lavenham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come cloth business nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England. Morì il 22 dicembre 1550, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

ja.Lavenham, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクラベンハム
ja.Long Melford, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクロング メルフォード
ja.Sudbury, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクスドブリー
ja.lifeSummary: John Hammondが1500年4月16日にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父John Hammondは25歳，母Lady Johanna Johne Heimbachは25歳であった。約1541年にイギリスイギリススフォルクラベンハムでAgnes Nowellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリススフォルクラベンハムでの職業はcloth businessと記録されている。彼は1550年12月22日に故郷で50歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hammond(이)가 1500년 4월 16일 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hammond(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1541년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레이븐함에서 Agnes Nowell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 cloth business이었다. 그는 1550년 12월 22일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에 묻혔다.

mn.16 April 1500–22 December 1550: 1500 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 16–1550 оны Арванхоёрдугаар сарын 22

pt.16 April 1500–22 December 1550: 16 de abril de 1500–22 de dezembro de 1550
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hammond nasceu em 16 de abril de 1500, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hammond, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Nowell aproximadamente 1541, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como cloth business em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 22 de dezembro de 1550, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hammond родился 16 апреля 1500 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Hammond было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Nowell около 1541 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии cloth business в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия. Он умер 22 декабря 1550 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия.

es.16 April 1500–22 December 1550: 16 de abril de 1500–22 de diciembre de 1550
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hammond nació el 16 de abril de 1500, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Hammond, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lady Johanna Johne Heimbach, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnes Nowell aproximadamente 1541, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era cloth business en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Murió el 22 de diciembre de 1550, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
